'''Renia Brila''', wife of [[Tanass Brila]], was a [[Doctor/Legends|doctor]] and a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. A respected physician, she was recruited into the Alliance along with her husband and operated a [[16AA889 Starfield Road|safehouse]] for the local Rebel cell. She had her private practice as well as working at a local [[Medcenter/Legends|medical center]].<ref name="H&S" />

==Personality and traits==
Brila was intelligent and outgoing.<ref name="H&S" />

==Equipment==
Brila always kept a full [[medkit]] in her [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]] so she could respond to emergency calls.<ref name="H&S" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1998-XX-XX -->''[[Hideouts & Strongholds]]'' {{1stm}}
